_description: Renatus MCP server — drop this into your Bob, Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf MCP config. The host LLM does the reasoning; Renatus does the indexing, patching, examining, and signing. The keys prefixed with '_' are informational only; MCP clients ignore unknown top-level fields.

_tier1_tools.name: migrate_repository
_tier1_tools.description: Cross-version migration. Bundled rule packs (e.g. React 18 -> 19, Tailwind 3 -> 4) or arbitrary changelog/diff/upgrade-guide text.

_tier1_tools.name: refactor_repository
_tier1_tools.description: Natural-language repo-wide refactor with regression tests. No rules needed.

_tier1_tools.name: security_audit_repository
_tier1_tools.description: CVE-driven mitigation patches with exploit-replay tests. Accepts a CVE id (fetched from NVD) or pasted advisory text.
_tier1_tools.input: { repoUrl, cveSource: { kind: 'cve-id', cveId } | { kind: 'advisory-text', advisoryText }, ecosystem? }

_tier1_tools.name: query_codebase
_tier1_tools.description: Read-only Q&A across the codebase. Returns a cited answer with a signed transcript (ed25519). Skips Surgeon and Auditor.
